title: calorophus vestitus
intro: Calorophus vestitus, also known as the Mexican honeysuckle or coral honeysuckle, is a flowering plant species in the family Boraginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which are believed to provide relief from various health issues. Some of the reported health benefits of Calorophus vestitus include its ability to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Calorophus vestitus can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can be used in various herbal preparations, including capsules and tinctures.
